sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108675" key="u(poleiptiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπολειπ-τικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n108675.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">possessing direct motion only</tr_> (i. e. Eastward along the ecliptic), of the sun and moon, Adrastus ap. Theon.Sm.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.147</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
